name: Gitee
description: Chinese Git-based code hosting and DevOps platform (码云) by Open Source China with 10M+ developers.

seo.title: Gitee — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Gitee: Chinese Git-based code hosting and DevOps platform (码云) by Open Source China with 10M+ developers.

when_to_use: Domestic Chinese Git hosting compliant with local regs
DevOps CI/CD pipelines with 10M+ developer community
Issue tracking and code review for Chinese enterprises
Webhook integration with Chinese CI/CD ecosystems

pros: The dominant Git host inside China
Strong performance and CN network proximity
Free private repos with generous limits
cons: Content and account moderation per CN regulation
review.verdict: Essential if you serve or operate in China; elsewhere, GitHub or GitLab remain the better fit.
review.best_for: Chinese teams and projects that need fast local Git hosting with CI.
review.not_for: Teams outside China concerned about moderation or latency.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.
